penn-engineering-masters-fall-2026.excerpt:
Applications for our master’s programs are open from September 15, 2025, until February 1, 2026. Applications for our doctoral programs are open from September 15, 2025, until December 15, 2025.
Application deadline 11:59 p.m. EST
Early admissions deadline 11:59 p.m. EST
Regular admissions deadline 11:59 p.m. EST
penn-engineering-masters-fall-2026.matchedText: Applications for our master’s programs are open from September 15, 2025, until February 1, 2026. Applications for our doctoral programs are open from September 15, 2025, until December 15, 2025.
